mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`store` ( user_id, store_name, address_primary, category, postal_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeName}, #{addressPrimary}, #{category}, '00000', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, user_id AS userId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, category FROM `petlog`.`store` WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, category, store_phone AS storePhone, created_at AS createdAt, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`store` WHERE lat IS NULL OR lng IS NULL

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, category, store_phone AS storePhone, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`store` WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY store_name

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, category, store_phone AS storePhone, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`store` ORDER BY store_name
mapper.update: UPDATE petlog.store SET store_name = #{storeName}, category = #{category}, address_primary = #{addressPrimary}, address_secondary = #{addressSecondary}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, store_phone = #{storePhone}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
